Interface IBaseNetworkLocation

ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase

ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to the locations family resource for networks.

[Guid("C0477EBE-2561-45CF-A86B-2ABA513ED924")]
